content: Self-Refine’s single-perspective iterative refinement framework can be augmented by integrating multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a multi-perspective self-refinement pipeline that retains Self-Refine’s core advantage of no extra training or supervision, while resolving blind spots that a single self-feedback loop cannot catch. This combined framework would outperform both existing single-perspective Self-Refine and isolated multi-perspective reflection methods on complex tasks like open-ended code generation and reasoning.
